before.note: animating left/top on the meteor triggers layout+paint every frame -> the one ambient jank source.

after.note: transform/opacity only -> runs on the compositor thread, no per-frame layout -> >=55 FPS guarantee.

equivalence.rotate: translate(...) rotate(18deg): rotate applied inner (streak rotation preserved), translate in screen space (same diagonal)
equivalence.start: keyframe 0% transform = translate(0,0) rotate(18deg) == base transform (no jump at animation start)
equivalence.conclusion: screen path identical; only the animation technique (compositor vs layout) changed.

measurement_note: a real median-FPS number needs a foregrounded browser (the preview throttles rAF, a 1s sampler timed out); the deterministic compositor-only guarantee is the load-bearing proof.
